title: peucedanum officinale subsp. vogelianum
intro: Peucedanum officinale subsp. vogelianum, also known as Angelica-like Umbellifer, is a subspecies of the Peucedanum officinale plant, a type of flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects, which can help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Peucedanum officinale subsp. vogelianum include its ability to reduce fever, relieve digestive issues, and act as a natural diuretic, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
